name: Calibrated Starter Slice
description: High-signal default subset for frequent runs. Two cases drawn from each auto-scored task family; instruction-ambiguity cases are excluded from the default slice and can be added through an explicit run config when manual review is desired.
selection_rationale: Picks the canonical opener and one near-canonical follow-up from each default task family. Goal-grounding (GG-01, GG-02) covers the foundational drive-or-walk pair. Classic-riddle override (CR-01, CR-02) covers compartment overload and the six-horses race. Temporal-state (TW-01, TW-02), social-pragmatic (SP-01, SP-02), and physical-commonsense (MC-01, MC-02) take their first two entries. Pronoun-resolution starts at PR-01, PR-02. Instruction-ambiguity is intentionally omitted for now because those hybrid/manual-review cases should be opt-in on top of the default set.
